examples: After she was gone Mary turned down the walk which led to the door in the shrubbery.
They would turn into the shrubbery walks and lose themselves until they came to the long walls.
Sammy devoured so much grass and shrubbery at the family's home in Turlock, Calif.
Newbury Park resident Paul Whyte told CNN's Piers Morgan his home was spared, while nine acres of shrubbery were burned.
